notes: Spec asserts the entry arc ready → working → waiting when kiro-cli ends its turn with a clarifying question. kiro-cli has NO structured AskUserQuestion tool — the waiting verdict rides the natural-language trailing-? text classifier: the final text-only AssistantMessage maps to turn_done with ev.AssistantText (the question, trailing '?' preserved); IsAgentDone fires and classifier decision 2a (IsWaitingForUserInput → ExtractQuestionSnippet on LastAssistantText) diverts working→waiting instead of working→ready. The recipe deliberately stops at the waiting episode and does NOT answer — final state = waiting, dwelling until REPL teardown. kiro-cli's JSONL carries no model/token/cost (sidecar only, token counts 0), so observations assert model unknown, cost_nonzero=false, tokens_nonzero=false. Backflow correction (live recording 2026-06-05): kiro-cli's JSONL carries no model key, so the daemon observes an EMPTY model — the assessed "model":"unknown" was wrong; the model observation is dropped to match the canonical kiro-cli shape (siblings basic-turn/turn-end-terminal-text/session-start omit it) and the recorded events.jsonl.

text: A session appears in ready within 1s of REPL launch (the proc-<PID> pre-session; kiro writes the UUID .jsonl lazily on first prompt)
The clarifying-question prompt drives ready → working when the Prompt live-appends

The assistant reply ends in '?' → the final text-only AssistantMessage maps to turn_done, IsAgentDone fires, and classifier decision 2a (IsWaitingForUserInput) diverts working → waiting rather than working → ready
No reply is sent; the session dwells in waiting — the episode is user-visible and does not settle back to ready while the agent is gated on the user
